summary: Seller Client Verification System Testing Complete - All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly. Admin can view Locked Sellers tab, Seller share functionality works with lock/unlock based on pending verifications.
critical_code_review_comments: All seller verification APIs working correctly
Admin Locked Sellers tab displays correctly with 'No Locked Accounts' message when empty
Seller Account Locking Rule explanation displayed in UI
Share button shows locked/unlocked state based on pending verifications
Share modal includes referral code for tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seller Client Verification System is fully functional. Backend APIs for check-share-lock, pending-verifications, verify-client, admin/locked-sellers, admin/unlock-seller all working. Frontend shows Locked Sellers tab in Admin Dashboard > Seller Performance section. Currently no sellers are locked (empty list expected).

Backend_admin_access_key.details: Access key 0219 verification grants full admin access

Backend_check_share_lock.details: Returns share_locked and account_locked status for seller

Backend_pending_verifications.details: Returns pending verifications list and today's referrals

Backend_verify_client.details: Validates referral_id, status (closed_won/closed_lost/in_progress), notes for in_progress

Backend_track_referral.details: Tracks new client referrals with 24-hour verification window

Backend_verification_history.details: Returns verification history with stats for last 7 days

Backend_admin_locked_sellers.details: Returns list of locked sellers (currently empty)

Backend_admin_unlock_seller.details: Returns 404 for non-existent locked seller (expected behavior)

Backend_admin_verification_stats.details: Returns verification stats for all sellers

Frontend_Admin_Access_Type_Modal.details: Shows Admin Access and Inventory Access options after login

Frontend_Admin_Key_Verification.details: Verifies admin key 0219 and grants full access

Frontend_Seller_Performance_Panel.details: Shows tabs: Daily Tracking, Leaderboard, Earnings & Payout, Locked Sellers, Motivation Quotes

Frontend_Locked_Sellers_Tab.details: Shows 'Locked Seller Accounts' with count, locking rule explanation, and 'No Locked Accounts' message when empty

Frontend_Seller_Dashboard.details: Shows tabs: Overview, Performance, Follow-ups, Properties, My Referrals, Client Visits, Earnings, Receive Leads

Frontend_Share_Button.details: Share buttons show locked/unlocked state based on shareLockStatus

Frontend_Share_Modal.details: Share modal shows WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS options with referral code included

Frontend_Client_Verification_Modal.details: Modal appears when there are pending verifications older than 24 hours

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - seller verification data stored in MongoDB collections: seller_client_referrals, seller_account_locks

screenshots: .screenshots/06_locked_sellers.png - Locked Sellers tab with 'No Locked Accounts'
